zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Curwen I於大約1407年出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，他的父親Sir Christopher Curwen I11405歲，母親Elizabeth Hudleston27歲。他和Anne Lowther至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他於1450年被列為sheriff of cumberland。他去世於1478年之後在英國波藍德沃爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Curwen I于大约1407年出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir Christopher Curwen I11405岁，母亲Elizabeth Hudleston27岁。他和Anne Lowther至少有5个儿子和5个女儿。他于1450年被列为sheriff of cumberland。他去世于1478年之后在英国波藍德沃爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Curwen I was born about 1407, in Workington, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Christopher Curwen I, was 11405 and his mother, Elizabeth Hudleston, was 27. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Anne Lowther. In 1450, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cumberland. He died after 1478, in Workington, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Curwen I est né environ 1407, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Christopher Curwen I, avait 11405 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hudleston, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Anne Lowther. En 1450, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cumberland. Il est décédé après 1478, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Curwen I um 1407 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher Curwen I 11405 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hudleston 27. Er hatte mit Anne Lowther mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1450, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cumberland aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1478 in Workington, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Curwen I è nato il circa 1407 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Christopher Curwen I, aveva 11405 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hudleston, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Anne Lowther. Nel 1450, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cumberland. Morì dopo il 1478, nel Workington, Cumberland, England.

ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Curwen Iが約1407年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Curwen Iは11405歳，母Elizabeth Hudlestonは27歳であった。彼はAnne Lowtherとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。1450年，44歳の時，職業はsheriff of cumberlandと記録されている。彼は1478年以後にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Curwen I(이)가 대략 1407년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher Curwen I(은)는 11405세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hudleston(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Anne Lowther(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1450년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cumberland이었다. 그는 1478년 이후 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Curwen I nasceu aproximadamente 1407, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Christopher Curwen I, tinha 11405 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hudleston, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas com Anne Lowther. Em 1450, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cumberland. Ele faleceu após 1478, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Curwen I родился около 1407 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Christopher Curwen I было 11405 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hudleston, 27. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Anne Lowther. В 1450 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cumberland. Он умер после 1478 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1407–after 1478: e tusa o le 1407–ina ua ma'ea le 1478

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Curwen I nació aproximadamente 1407, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Christopher Curwen I, tenía 11405 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hudleston, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas con Anne Lowther. En 1450, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cumberland. Murió después de 1478, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
